title: Cosmic Byte God Mode
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Cosmic Byte God Mode}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=Cosmic Byte God Mode |icon=Cosmic Byte God Mode allmode logo.png |tickername=Cosmic Byte God Mode |image=Cosmic Byte God Mode allmode logo.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=God Mode |organizer=The Esports Club |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ |sponsor=[https://www.thecosmicbyte.com/ Cosmic Byte] |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=10,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-10-23|edate=2021-10-24 |facebook=theesportsclub.TEC |web=https://theesports.club |instagram=theesportsclub |youtube=TheEsportsClub |twitter=theesportsclub1 |discord=theesportsclub }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ The Esports Club]''' in association with '''[https://www.thecosmicbyte.com/ Cosmic Byte]''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the '''''Cosmic Byte God Mode''''' with a prize pool of ₹10,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1name=Shubham Chawla|b1flag=in |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in |b3=Frittz Plays|b3name=Divyanshu Saksena|b3flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Cosmic Byte God Mode:''' 11th October 2021 to 24th October 2021.'' * '''''Online Qualifiers:''' 11th October 2021 to 13th October 2021'' ** '' A total of 30 Invited teams will be divided into 3 groups ** '' 15 matches to be played over a period of 3 days'' ** '' Each group will play a total of 5 matches'' ** '' Top 6 teams from each group will advance to the Play-Off Stage.'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|18 teams}} will advance to the ''Play-Offs''.
* '''''Group A Play-Offs:''' 18th October 2021 to 19th October 2021'' ** '' A total of 19 teams(10 Invited +9 Qualified from Online Qualifiers) will play in Group A ** '' Each team will play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to the ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|7th to 15th placed}} teams will be relegated to the to the ''Play-Ins''.
* '''''Group B Play-Offs:''' 20th October 2021 to 21st October 2021'' ** '' A total of 19 teams(10 Invited +9 Qualified from Online Qualifiers) ** '' Each team will play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to the ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|7th to 15th placed}} teams will be relegated to the to the ''Play-Ins''.
* '''''Play-Ins:''' 22nd October 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 teams (7th to 15th placed from Group A&B) will compete in the Play-Ins'' ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 5 matches in a single day'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} advance to ''Grand Finals''.
* '''''Grand Finals:''' 23rd October 2021 to 24th October 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 qualified teams (6 from Group A Qualifers + 6 from Group B Qualifers + 6 from Play-Ins) will play in the Grand Finals'' ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** '' Each day will feature a total of 5 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''2 Matchdays: 5 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''(E>>M>>E>>M>>E)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-20}}||0 |} ==Prize Pool== ₹10,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $13,338 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
